sections.paragraph: β´ numerical sign = 2 (δύο: Jos., C. Ap. 1, 157; Ar. [Milne 76, 28]) Hs 8, 9, 1 (cod. A for δύο) Lk 10:35 P75 (β̄); or 2d (δευτέρα), i.e. ἐπιστολή (in the superscriptions of 2 Cor, 2 Th, 2 Ti, 2 Pt, 2J, 2 Cl, and in the subscriptions of 2 Th, 2 Ti, 2J), or ὅρασις (in the superscr. of Hv 2), or ἐντολή (in the superscr. of Hm 2).
